{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Soulsmith tools
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] has a leather roll containing his [[Soulsmith tools]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Soulsmith tools]] are kept in pouches and from loops on a bundle of leather.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
